text_template: New England summers don't exactly ease you in. One minute you're wearing a jacket, sleeping with the windows open, the next you're melting and your apartment feels unbearable, and suddenly that old window AC is rattling in the corner. That's where Windmill Air comes in. Windmill window ACs are sleek. They're quiet and designed for modern homes without the bulky eyesore hanging out your window. They're also rated the number one easiest AC to install with no tools required and a setup designed to be simple and easy to install. and stress-free right out of the box. And unlike traditional units that blast cold air in one direction, Windmill pushes air upward at a 45 degree angle to circulate cool air more evenly throughout the room, more like central air. Plus, you can control everything right from your phone. You can adjust temperatures, set schedules, even cool your space.
